title: Origin Realms - Pokeballs
description: Turns Capture Net into Pokeballs, with custom sounds and variants. This is for the Origin Realms Server Only.
body:
This mod changes the 2D Capture net textures into 3D models of Pokeballs, with custom sounds and up to 4 variated Pokeball variants:
Pokeball: Small Passive Mobs
Greatball: Medium-Large Passive/Neutral Mobs
Ultraball: Hostile Mobs (Weakness Potion required)
Masterball: Hostile Mobs (Bewitched Weakness Potion required)
